  • Uses of S2CPacket in lu.kbra.p4j.socket.server

    Methods in lu.kbra.p4j.socket.server with parameters of type S2CPacket
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    P4JServer.broadcast(S2CPacket<?> packet)
    Sends the packet to all the connected clients.
    void
    P4JServer.broadcastIf(S2CPacket<?> packet, Predicate<ServerClient> condition)
    Iterates over all the connected clients and sends the specified packet if the predicate's condition is met.
    boolean
    ServerClient.write(S2CPacket packet)
    Writes a packet from the server to the client.
    Method parameters in lu.kbra.p4j.socket.server with type arguments of type S2CPacket
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    P4JServer.broadcast(Function<ServerClient,S2CPacket<?>> packetSupplier)
    Sends the packet provided by the supplier to all the connected clients.
    void
    P4JServer.broadcast(List<S2CPacket<?>> packets)
    Sends the packets to all the connected clients.
    void
    P4JServer.broadcastIf(Function<ServerClient,S2CPacket<?>> packetSupplier, Predicate<ServerClient> condition)
    Iterates over all the connected clients and sends the packet provided by the supplier, if the predicate's condition is met.
    void
    P4JServer.broadcastIf(List<S2CPacket<?>> packets, Predicate<ServerClient> condition)
    Iterates over all the connected clients and sends the specified packet(s) if the predicate's condition is met.
